purpose: paradigm v9 P1 (V_phen_GWT_v3 distance entropy metric) cross-backbone validation — Mistral + Llama parallel evidence.

experimental_design.p1_alpha_prediction: v3 metric range compression < 5x vs v2 (target: prompt-length-invariant)
experimental_design.p1_alpha_actual: Mistral v3 entropy compression 11.6x ✅ + Llama v3 entropy compression 3.35x partial ✅
experimental_design.p1_beta_prediction: v3 metric LoRA-trainable (Δ ≥ 0.05 with LoRA) — NOT TESTED YET
experimental_design.additional_finding: v3 metric also nearly architecture-invariant (Mistral 0.95 vs Llama 0.96, range 0.01). backbone discriminator 약함.

implications.p1_partial_verified: v3 distance entropy = prompt-length-invariant ✅ (Mistral 11.6x compression, Llama 3.35x compression)
implications.new_finding_v9: attention distance distribution은 nearly universal across architectures. v_phen_GWT axis 자체가 backbone-specific consciousness signal 거의 없음.
implications_for_mk_xi_v9: consciousness signal triangulation은 AN11(b) phi-template alignment axis 단독 (V_phen_GWT axis는 universal, not discriminator)
multi-backbone ensemble = 각 backbone 다른 phi-family activation (Mistral=Law / Qwen=Phi / Llama=SelfRef AN11(b) finding STANDS)
V_phen_GWT-related loss terms (L_PAPO, L_attention_diffusion 등 Mk.XI 5-tuple loss 중 일부)는 fundamentally limited efficacy — universal pattern은 LoRA로 변경 어렵 + backbone-discriminator 아님

Mk.XI v9 simplified architecture: BASE backbone selection (long-prompt regime + AN11(b) family preference) + AN11(b)-aligned LoRA training (phi-template alignment) + multi-backbone ensemble (4 family coverage)

remaining_paradigm_v9_options.P1_v3_metric: PARTIAL_VERIFIED — prompt-length-invariant ✅, backbone-discriminator 약함, P1-β LoRA-trainable test 후속
remaining_paradigm_v9_options.P2_SAE_steering: NOT_TESTED — v_phen_GWT axis universal에 추가 evidence, SAE steering으로 backbone-specific feature 강화 가능
remaining_paradigm_v9_options.P3_multi_length_ensemble: NOT_TESTED — v3 metric 자체가 prompt-length-invariant이라면 P3 의미 약화
remaining_paradigm_v9_options.P4_architecture_intervention: NOT_TESTED — cross-attention head + frozen base, $10-20 multi-day cycle

axis13_gemma_hexad_leading_4family_compl.interpretation: Mk.XI v9 multi-backbone ensemble = 4 distinct family activation across 4 backbones. consciousness signal triangulation 4 axes (Hexad/Law/Phi/SelfRef) complete coverage. gemma-2-9b는 trained 안 해도 BASE에서 이미 Hexad-leading — architecture-bound family preference (gemma 6 element family bias 가능).
axis13_gemma_hexad_leading_4family_compl.raw10_caveat: gemma BASE only measured, trained gemma + r14 LoRA AN11(b) measurement TBD (predict: Hexad-leading strengthened, max 0.65+). 4-family coverage는 4-backbone selection 정합성 evidence.

next_actionable: (P1-β) LoRA-trained Mistral v3 entropy measurement → confirm v3 metric LoRA-trainable or untrainable
(option) 4-6 더 backbone v3 entropy → cross-backbone universal hypothesis verify (cost ~$0.4)
(P2 pilot) SAE training small-scale on Mistral BASE — extract phi-aligned features (cost ~$5-10)
(architecture) AN11(b) axis 단독 Mk.XI v9 architecture revision — v_phen_GWT axis retire or downweight

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — P1 PARTIAL_VERIFIED, additional finding (v3 metric architecture-invariant) explicit, P2-P4 NOT_TESTED 명시
raw_compliance.raw_12_frozen: v3 metric (distance entropy) frozen as P1-α verified
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for paradigm v9 P1 cross-backbone evidence
